get_immediate_supervisors.Script: select a.agent_id AgentId , a.agent_code AgentCode, a.first_name FirstName, a.middle_name MiddleName, a.last_name LastName, a.agent_name AgentName, a.channel Channel, a.subchannel SubChannel, a.designation_code DesignationCode, a.pan_number PanNumber , a.aadhaar_number aadhaar_number from hms.agent a where exists ( SELECT p.agent_id FROM hms.agent_hierarchy AS c JOIN hms.agent_hierarchy AS p ON p.hierarchy_path = subpath(c.hierarchy_path, 0, nlevel(c.hierarchy_path) - 1) WHERE c.agent_id = a.agent_id and a.agent_id = @p_agent_id and a.orgid = @p_orgid )

get_immediate_reportees.Script: select a.agent_id AgentId , a.agent_code AgentCode, a.first_name FirstName, a.middle_name MiddleName, a.last_name LastName, a.agent_name AgentName, a.channel Channel, a.subchannel SubChannel, a.designation_code DesignationCode, a.pan_number PanNumber , a.aadhaar_number aadhaar_number from hms.agent a where exists (SELECT c.agent_id FROM hms.agent_hierarchy AS p JOIN hms.agent_hierarchy AS c ON c.hierarchy_path <@ p.hierarchy_path AND nlevel(c.hierarchy_path) = nlevel(p.hierarchy_path) + 1 WHERE c.agent_id = a.agent_id and p.agent_id = @p_agent_id and a.orgid = @p_orgid)

get_reportees_by_channel_location.Script: SELECT a.agent_id AS AgentId, a.agent_code AS AgentCode, a.agent_name AS AgentName, dm.designation_name AS AgentDesignation, lm.location_desc AS Location FROM hms.agent a LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.designation_master dm ON a.designation_code::int8 = dm.designation_id LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.location_master lm ON a.location_code::int8 = lm.location_master_id WHERE a.orgid = @p_orgid AND a.channel::int8 = @channel AND a.location_code::int8 = @location_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hms.agent_hierarchy as p JOIN hms.agent_hierarchy as c ON c.hierarchy_path <@ p.hierarchy_path AND nlevel(c.hierarchy_path) = nlevel(p.hierarchy_path) + 1 WHERE c.agent_id = a.agent_id)

GetChannelStats.Script: SELECT cm.channel_id AS "ChannelId", cm.channel_name AS "ChannelName", COUNT(a.agent_id) AS "TotalEntities", COUNT(a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.created_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS "CreatedEntities", COUNT(a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.is_active = false AND a.modified_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS "TerminatedEntities" FROM hmsmaster.channel_master cm LEFT JOIN hms.agent a ON cm.channel_id = a.channel WHERE cm.orgid = @p_orgid GROUP BY cm.channel_id, cm.channel_name;

getKeyValueEntries.Script: select * from hmsmaster.KeyValueEntries where orgid = @orgid and EntryCategory =@EntryCategory

UpdateDesignation.Script: update hmsmaster.designation_master set hierarchy_path = REPLACE(coalesce(hierarchy_path::text,@p_designationIdText),@p_oldParentPath,@p_newParentPath)::ltree where orgid = @p_orgId and channel_id = @p_channelID and sub_channel_id = @p_subChannelId and (hierarchy_path = @p_oldParentPath::ltree OR hierarchy_path < @p_oldParentPath::ltree or designation_id = @p_designationId)

GetBranchHierarchyByBranchId.Script: SELECT channel_location_heirarchy_id ChannelLocationHeirarchyId, hierarchy_path HierarchyPath,channel_id ChannelId, sub_channel_id SubChannelId FROM hmsmaster.channel_branch_heirarchy WHERE branch_id = @p_branchId AND orgid = @p_orgId AND channel_id = @p_channelId AND sub_channel_id = @p_subChannelId

UpdateChildBranchesByBranchId.Script: UPDATE hmsmaster.channel_branch_heirarchy SET hierarchy_path = REPLACE(coalesce(hierarchy_path::text,@p_branchIdText),@p_oldParentPath,@p_newParentPath) ::ltree, modified_date = NOW(), modified_by = @p_modifiedBy WHERE hierarchy_path = @p_oldParentPath::ltree OR hierarchy_path < @p_oldParentPath::ltree or branch_id = @p_branchId

GetConfigList.Script: SELECT cc.commission_config_id AS "CommissionConfigId", jc.job_name AS "CommissionName", jc.start_at AS "RunFrom", jc.end_at AS "RunTo", cc.formula AS "Formula", cc.created_at AS "CreatedAt", cc.created_by AS "CreatedBy", cc.job_config_id AS "JobConfigId", je.filter AS "FilterCondition", je.comments AS "Comments", jc.job_type AS "JobType", jc.enabled AS "Enabled", jc.trigger_type AS "TriggerType", jc.cron_expression AS "CronExpression", jc.interval_seconds AS "IntervalSeconds", jc.parameters AS "Parameters", jc.updated_at AS "UpdatedAt", jc.targettype AS "TargetType", jc.targetmethod AS "TargetMethod", jc.args AS "Args", COUNT(*) OVER() AS "TotalCount" FROM comss.commission_config cc JOIN scheduler.job_config jc ON cc.job_config_id = jc.job_config_id JOIN scheduler.job_extns je ON jc.job_config_id = je.job_config_id WHERE cc.orgid = @p_orgid ORDER BY cc.created_at DESC LIMIT @p_page_size OFFSET ((@p_page_number - 1) * @p_page_size);

GetProcessComissionList.Script: SELECT jeh.job_exe_hist_id AS "JobExeHistId", jeh.job_config_id AS "JobConfigId", jc.job_name AS "CommissionName", jeh.started_at AS "StartedAt", jeh.finished_at AS "FinishedAt", jeh.totalrecs AS "Records", jeh.exe_status AS "ExeStatus", jeh.download_lnk AS "DownloadLnk", jeh.orgid AS "OrgId", COUNT(*) OVER() AS "TotalCount" FROM scheduler.job_exe_hist jeh JOIN scheduler.job_config jc ON jeh.job_config_id = jc.job_config_id WHERE jeh.orgid = @p_orgid ORDER BY jeh.started_at DESC LIMIT @p_page_size OFFSET ((@p_page_number - 1) * @p_page_size);

GetProcessCommissionExcel.Script: SELECT cjed.comm_job_exe_dtls_id AS "CommJobExeDtlsId", cjed.job_exe_hist_id AS "JobExeHistId", cjed.agent_id AS "AgentId", a.agent_name AS "AgentName", k.entrydesc AS "Channel", cjed.premiucollid AS "PremiumCollectionId", cjed.premium_amt AS "PremiumAmount", cjed.formula AS "Formula", cjed.comm_amt AS "CommissionAmount", cjed.status AS "Status", cjed.logs AS "Logs", pc.premiucollid AS "PcPremiumCollectionId", pc.policyref AS "PolicyRef", pc.premium_received_dt AS "PremiumReceivedDate", pc.premium_type AS "PremiumType", pc.prem_coll_yr AS "PremiumCollectionYear", pc.prem_coll_qtr AS "PremiumCollectionQuarter", pc.prem_coll_fin_yr AS "PremiumCollectionFinYear", ip.policyno AS "PolicyNo", ip.policysuffix AS "PolicySuffix", ip.riskstartdt AS "RiskStartDate", ip.riskenddt AS "RiskEndDate", ip.policyterm AS "PolicyTerm", ip.prempayingterm AS "PremiumPayingTerm", ip.proposerclientid AS "ProposerClientId", ip.lifeinsuredclientid AS "LifeInsuredClientId", ip.isstaffpolicy AS "IsStaffPolicy", ip.policysourcecode AS "PolicySourceCode", ip.insuredpan AS "InsuredPAN", ip.proposerpan AS "ProposerPAN", ip.insureddob AS "InsuredDOB", ip.proposerdob AS "ProposerDOB", ip.logindt AS "LoginDate", ip.insuredgender AS "InsuredGender", ip.proposergender AS "ProposerGender", ip.maturityageinmonths AS "MaturityAgeInMonths", ip.modalbasepremium AS "ModalBasePremium", ip.modalbaseriderpremium AS "ModalBaseRiderPremium", ip.prod_code AS "ProductCode" FROM comss.comm_job_exe_dtls cjed LEFT JOIN hms.agent a ON a.agent_id = cjed.agent_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT entryidentity, MAX(entrydesc) AS entrydesc FROM hmsmaster.keyvalueentries GROUP BY entryidentity) k ON k.entryidentity = a.channel LEFT JOIN insu_core.premium_collected pc ON pc.premiucollid = cjed.premiucollid AND pc.orgid = cjed.orgid LEFT JOIN insu_core.ins_policy ip ON ip.policyref = pc.policyref AND ip.orgid = cjed.orgid WHERE cjed.orgid = @p_orgid AND cjed.job_exe_hist_id = @p_job_exe_hist_id ORDER BY cjed.comm_job_exe_dtls_id;
